description: After scheduled commercial discovery genuinely calls Exa, move that same Ash interface behind one idempotent Oban worker. Model run lifecycle as durable Ash-owned state with queued/running/completed/partial_failure/failed outcomes, query provenance, cost, candidate counts, program linkage, idempotency key, attempt history, and terminal diagnostics; do not hide authoritative run state in ad hoc program metadata. Recover abandoned work and avoid duplicate candidates/findings on retry. Acceptance: scheduled and manual launches enqueue the same worker, worker tests cover enqueue/perform/retry, and run/attention surfaces load state through Ash reads.
title: Run Exa discovery programs durably through Oban
